title: rubus alterniflorus subsp. valdeproximus
intro: Rubus alterniflorus subsp. valdeproximus is a subspecies of the fragrant raspberry, a type of bramble that belongs to the rose family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rubus alterniflorus subsp. valdeproximus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile addition to traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
